statement: On the completed high closed-trace block, the active source rows factor through the global trace map and hence vanish on ker R_global.

synchronizedActiveRangeInputStatus.label: synchronized active range input
synchronizedActiveRangeInputStatus.reason: The synchronized active-range theorem supplies active range inclusion and closed-trace active annihilation.

closedTraceUniqueContinuationInputStatus.label: closed-trace active unique-continuation input
closedTraceUniqueContinuationInputStatus.reason: The closed-trace active unique-continuation theorem proves Lambda_a(f)=0 on I implies E_active f=0.

activeTraceControlConsequenceStatus.label: active trace control consequence
activeTraceControlConsequenceStatus.reason: Combining the active-range inclusion with closed-trace unique continuation gives R_global f=0 => E_active f=0.

proof: Use the closed-trace active unique-continuation theorem on the interval trace family.
Use the synchronized active-range theorem to identify the active source plane with the closed trace range.
Conclude that every active source row annihilates H_M cap ker R_global.
